---
title: "table1"
output: html_notebook
---

# Load libraries
```{r}
library(caret)
library(data.table)
library(dplyr)
library(sets)
library(scales)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)
library(tibble)
library(tidygeocoder)
library(stringi)
library(ggplot2)


library(psych)
library(tidyverse)
library(irr)


library(readr) # For read_tsv
```

# #######################################################################

# TODO: Circ HF results: 
- input file: Circulation_HF/MLHC_modelinputs.csv
- train file: private_CHIL_repo/scripts/Circulation_HF/bal_allfeats_MLHC_nosmote_sgs_evaluate_baselines_nestKfold.py
- output file: private_CHIL_repo/scripts/3-21-ACC/Circulation_HF/Circ_HF_results_individualfolds.csv

```{r}

hf_results <- read.csv("./Circ_HF_results_individualfolds.csv")
hf_results
```
